landing.title: Every photo and video from your wedding. In one place.
landing.subtitle: Guests scan a QR code and share memories — no app, no sign-up.

steps.one: Create your event and get a QR code
steps.two: Guests scan it and upload photos and videos
steps.three: All memories in one private gallery

meta.title: WediFrame — wedding photos and videos in one place
meta.description: A private gallery for your wedding. Guests share photos and videos with no app and no sign-up — they just scan a QR code.
